_comment: Rule template. Copy the object below and customize. Do not include the _comment field in actual rules.

_example_good_1: Three desiccation-tolerant symbionts combine into a real ecological phenomenon

_example_good_2: Two cephalopods and a color-shifting reptile converge on a capability

_example_good_3: AI architecture meets its biological ancestor meets a geometric constant

_rules_for_good_rules: Every input must be an existing entity ID or a constant (phi, tau, sqrt3)
The output should be genuinely emergent — not reducible to any single input
Use UPPERCASE_SNAKE_CASE for the output concept
The combination should be surprising but defensible
Avoid tautology: [BE] -> BEE_INTELLIGENCE is NOT a good rule
